summary: Frontend testing of Photo Gallery Modal and Edit Vehicle Modal scroll fix features. Both features verified working correctly. Photo Gallery opens on vehicle photo click with dark overlay, title, photo counter (X/Y), and close button. For multi-photo vehicles, navigation arrows and thumbnail strip appear. Edit Modal now has proper maxHeight constraint - Save/Cancel buttons visible at y=949 in viewport.

issues: React controlled/uncontrolled input warning in console - minor React Native Web issue, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: PhotoGalleryModal.tsx: Well-implemented gallery with proper conditional rendering for arrows/thumbnails when photos.length > 1
EditVehicleModal.tsx: maxHeight fix using Dimensions.get('window').height * 0.85 is working - buttons reachable
VehicleCard.tsx: onPhotoPress callback correctly implemented - clicking photo opens gallery, clicking Modifier opens edit modal
vehicles.tsx: Proper state management with galleryVehicle state to coordinate gallery modal
context_for_next_testing_agent: Photo Gallery Modal and Edit Modal scroll fix both working. Gallery tested with single-photo vehicle (Renault Kangoo - shows 1/1 counter, no arrows/thumbs) and visually confirmed. Edit Modal buttons at y=949 - within 1080px viewport.

photo_gallery_modal.opens_on_photo_click: PASS - clicking vehicle photo opens gallery
photo_gallery_modal.close_button: PASS - X icon in top-right closes gallery

edit_modal_scroll_fix.all_sections_present: PASS - Statut, Marque, Modele, Identification, Type, Transmission, Carburant, Description, Photos, Documents

vehicle_cards.photo_count_badge: PASS - visible on cards showing image icon + count
vehicle_cards.modifier_button_opens_edit: PASS - Modifier opens Edit Modal (not gallery)
vehicle_cards.photo_click_opens_gallery: PASS - clicking photo opens gallery for vehicles with photos
